title: Manufacturing Engineer - Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group:
Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group!
